hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】Kraken 通过 Bitcoin Vault 扩展 Earn 套件，为持有的 BTC 支付收益；【WORLD】美国对伊朗军事基地发动新一轮袭击；【WORLD】即使美国和伊朗达成协议，黎巴嫩人也会接受长期战争。

items.title: Kraken expands Earn suite with Bitcoin Vault paying yield on BTC holdings
items.summary: Bitcoin Vault routes deposits into DeFi lending protocols, including Aave and Morpho, to generate BTC rewards.
items.title_zh: Kraken 通过 Bitcoin Vault 扩展 Earn 套件，为持有的 BTC 支付收益
items.summary_zh: Bitcoin Vault 将存款转入 DeFi 借贷协议（包括 Aave 和 Morpho），以产生 BTC 奖励。

items.title: US carries out new strikes on Iran military site
items.summary: The US military said it targeted a military site in Bandar Abbas - a strategic port city - and shot down four Iranian attack drones.
items.title_zh: 美国对伊朗军事基地发动新一轮袭击
items.summary_zh: 美国军方表示，它瞄准了战略港口城市阿巴斯港的一个军事基地，击落了四架伊朗攻击无人机。

items.title: Lebanese Resigned to a Long War, Even if U.S. and Iran Make a Deal
items.summary: Few in Lebanon believe that diplomatic efforts to end the wider war will bring peace to their country, as clashes between Israel and Hezbollah intensify in the south.
items.title_zh: 即使美国和伊朗达成协议，黎巴嫩人也会接受长期战争
items.summary_zh: 随着以色列和真主党在南部的冲突加剧，黎巴嫩很少有人相信结束更广泛战争的外交努力将为该国带来和平。

items.title: BIS project finds tokenization could make cross-border payments faster, safer
items.summary: Project Agorá, backed by major central banks, will now move toward "real-value" testing to settle tokenized central bank money and bank deposits on blockchain rails.
items.title_zh: BIS 项目发现代币化可以使跨境支付更快、更安全
items.summary_zh: 在主要央行的支持下，Agorá 项目现在将转向“实际价值”测试，以在区块链轨道上结算代币化的央行资金和银行存款。

items.title: Nio surges 9% after releasing first flagship EV in more than two years
items.summary: Chinese electric car company Nio has launched two lower-priced brands in the last two years to broaden its customer base in a sluggish Chinese consumer market.
items.title_zh: 蔚来汽车两年多来推出首款旗舰电动汽车，股价飙升 9%
items.summary_zh: 中国电动汽车公司蔚来在过去两年推出了两个低价品牌，以在低迷的中国消费市场中扩大客户群。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Conducts New Strikes on Southern Iran
items.summary: A U.S. official said on Wednesday the new attacks had been in self-defense and targeted attack drones and a drone ground-control station. They were the latest attacks to threaten a fragile cease-fire.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国对伊朗南部进行新的打击
items.summary_zh: 一名美国官员周三表示，新的袭击是出于自卫和有针对性的攻击无人机和无人机地面控制站。这是威胁脆弱停火的最新袭击。

items.title: Elon Musk could become a top 5 corporate bitcoin holder if Tesla and SpaceX merge
items.summary: CNBC reported Tuesday that Musk is discussing a merger between Tesla and SpaceX that would tie his tech empire closer together and instantly create the world’s fifth-largest corporate bitcoin treasury, worth $3.3 billion.
items.title_zh: 如果特斯拉和 SpaceX 合并，埃隆·马斯克可能成为前 5 大比特币持有者
items.summary_zh: CNBC 周二报道称，马斯克正在讨论特斯拉和 SpaceX 之间的合并，这将把他的科技帝国联系得更紧密，并立即创建世界第五大企业比特币金库，价值 33 亿美元。

items.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
items.summary: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.
items.title_zh: Warp 押注于使用 GPT-5.5 构建开源
items.summary_zh: Warp 使用 GPT-5.5 和 OpenAI 模型来协调本地、云和开源开发工作流程中的编码代理。

items.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
items.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.
items.title_zh: OpenAI、Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 宣布战略内容合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 与 Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 合作，将值得信赖的巴西新闻引入 ChatGPT，通过归属和透明度扩大新闻访问范围。

items.title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 使用 Nemotron-Labs 扩散语言模型实现光速文本生成

items.title: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan Chase could spend $20 billion on acquisition: 'We are on the lookout'
items.summary: A $20 billion deal would be among the largest in JPMorgan's history and could invite regulatory scrutiny given its position as the largest U.S. bank by assets.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示摩根大通可能斥资 200 亿美元进行收购：“我们正在密切关注”
items.summary_zh: 这笔 200 亿美元的交易将是摩根大通历史上规模最大的交易之一，鉴于其作为美国资产最大银行的地位，可能会引发监管审查。

items.title: Your AI agent can now trade for you on Robinhood. And buy stuff with your credit card too
items.summary: The new products allow customers to create AI assistants capable of carrying out investing strategies or spending instructions with minimal human involvement.
items.title_zh: 您的人工智能代理现在可以在 Robinhood 上为您进行交易。也可以用信用卡买东西
items.summary_zh: 新产品允许客户创建人工智能助手，能够在最少的人工参与下执行投资策略或支出指令。

items.title: Pope Leo is concerned about AI replacing human work. Traders share his concern long term
items.summary: The leader of the Catholic Church warned about artificial intelligence upending the labor market. Traders on Kalshi see unemployment jumping before 2030.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥担心人工智能取代人类工作。交易员也分享了他的长期担忧
items.summary_zh: 天主教会领袖警告人工智能颠覆劳动力市场。卡尔希的交易员预计 2030 年前失业率将大幅上升。

items.title: Israel issues evacuation order for swathes of southern Lebanon
items.summary: The military says areas south of the Zahrani River are now "combat zones" as it threatens Hezbollah with fresh strikes.
items.title_zh: 以色列向黎巴嫩南部大片地区发出撤离令
items.summary_zh: 军方表示，扎赫拉尼河以南地区现已成为“战区”，因为它威胁真主党发动新的袭击。

items.title: Jill Biden says she thought husband was 'having a stroke' during 2024 debate
items.summary: The former US first lady told CBS News that she was frightened by Joe Biden's performance against Donald Trump.
items.title_zh: 吉尔·拜登表示，她认为丈夫在 2024 年辩论中“中风”
items.summary_zh: 这位美国前第一夫人告诉哥伦比亚广播公司新闻，她对乔·拜登对阵唐纳德·特朗普的表现感到害怕。

items.title: Ebola-hit DR Congo faces 'catastrophic collision' of disease and conflict, WHO warns
items.summary: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus said fighting in DR Congo was hampering efforts to stop spread
items.title_zh: 世卫组织警告称，遭受埃博拉病毒袭击的刚果民主共和国面临疾病与冲突的“灾难性碰撞”
items.summary_zh: 谭德塞表示，刚果民主共和国的战斗阻碍了阻止疫情蔓延的努力

items.title: Could Russia Hit Harder? It at Least Wants Ukraine to Think So.
items.summary: Major attacks on Kyiv, followed by warnings of more, come as Moscow is stalled on the battlefield and at the negotiating table.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯能否加大打击力度？它至少希望乌克兰这么认为。
items.summary_zh: 莫斯科在战场上和谈判桌上陷入僵局之际，基辅遭到了大规模袭击，随后又发出了更多袭击的警告。

items.title: Google engineer insider-traded search results on Polymarket, Feds allege
items.summary: The charges mark the second major arrest over insider trading on a prediction market.
items.title_zh: 美联储指控谷歌在 Polymarket 上设计了内幕交易搜索结果
items.summary_zh: 这些指控标志着预测市场内幕交易的第二次重大逮捕。

items.title: The crypto industry’s massive political war chest is starting to lean Republican ahead of midterms
items.summary: As crypto world notches political wins in Texas and beyond, some of its emerging political action committees ditch bipartisan approach for a Republican focus.
items.title_zh: 在中期选举之前，加密货币行业庞大的政治资金开始向共和党倾斜
items.summary_zh: 随着加密货币世界在德克萨斯州及其他地区取得政治胜利，一些新兴的政治行动委员会放弃了两党合作，转而关注共和党。

items.title: Wall Street gets new crypto rival after Texas bank completes regulatory pivot
items.summary: By establishing a national charter under the executive branch, United Texas Bank said it intends to enable AI-driven payment rails to intercept global digital dollar volumes.
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州银行完成监管转向后，华尔街迎来了新的加密货币竞争对手
items.summary_zh: 德克萨斯联合银行表示，通过在行政部门下制定国家章程，其打算启用人工智能驱动的支付轨道来拦截全球数字美元交易量。

items.title: Crypto IPOs could create massive $1 trillion market amid tokenization wave, Jefferies says
items.summary: The Wall Street investment bank expects a wave of crypto and blockchain public listings over the next two years as institutional investors shift their focus from speculative trading to real-world financial infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 杰富瑞表示，在代币化浪潮中，加密货币 IPO 可能会创造 1 万亿美元的巨大市场
items.summary_zh: 这家华尔街投资银行预计，随着机构投资者将注意力从投机交易转向现实世界的金融基础设施，未来两年将出现一波加密货币和区块链公开上市浪潮。

items.title: A bipartisan bridge to the future: Why the Senate must finish the job on digital Assets
items.summary: The Clarity Act’s recent markup proved that the momentum for regulation is there. It is imperative that Congress move the bill forward to establish rules this generation needs and a framework the next will inherit, urges Kim.
items.title_zh: 通往未来的两党桥梁：为什么参议院必须完成数字资产的工作
items.summary_zh: 《澄清法案》最近的加价证明监管的势头已经存在。金敦促国会推进该法案，以制定这一代人需要的规则和下一代人将继承的框架。

items.title: Cash App lets users send USDC stablecoins on chains like Solana and Ethereum
items.summary: Cash App users can now transfer on Solana, Ethereum, Polygon and Arbitrum, but executive Miles Suter says the firm is still bitcoin-focused.
items.title_zh: Cash App 允许用户在 Solana 和以太坊等链上发送 USDC 稳定币
items.summary_zh: Cash App 用户现在可以在 Solana、Ethereum、Polygon 和 Arbitrum 上进行转账，但高管 Miles Suter 表示，该公司仍以比特币为重点。

items.title: Tokenized Pokémon card marketplaces hit record $7.4 million as hype peaks ahead of 30th anniversary
items.summary: On-chain Pokémon card revenue has surged 337% as 30th-anniversary mania lifts tokenized markets.
items.title_zh: 随着 30 周年纪念日到来之前的炒作达到顶峰，代币化的 Pokémon 卡牌市场价值达到创纪录的 740 万美元
items.summary_zh: 随着 30 周年纪念热潮提振代币化市场，链上神奇宝贝卡收入飙升 337%。

items.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
items.summary: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.
items.title_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程
items.summary_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 正在通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程，帮助思科扩展 AI 原生开发、加速 AI 防御工作并自动执行缺陷修复。

items.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
items.summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.
items.title_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 加速代码审查
items.summary_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 来审查代码并发布改进，使他们能够在几分钟而不是几小时内获得实质性反馈。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Crypto Long & Short: How the GENIUS Act repriced bitcoin's monetary premium
items.summary: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Ravi Tanuku on why the GENIUS Act didn't just regulate stablecoins, it repriced Bitcoin's monetary premium. Then, Jesper Johansen on why looped ETH staking no longer needs a lending market.
items.title_zh: 加密多头和空头：天才法案如何重新定价比特币的货币溢价
items.summary_zh: 在本周的《加密多空》中，Ravi Tanuku 阐述了为什么《天才法案》不仅监管稳定币，而且还重新定价了比特币的货币溢价。然后，Jesper Johansen 解释了为什么循环 ETH 质押不再需要借贷市场。

items.title: Bitcoin miner-to-AI boom sends stocks soaring as Cipher and Hut 8 hit fresh highs
items.summary: IREN climbed within 10% of a fresh all-time high after unveiling another major AI infrastructure expansion tied to Dell.
items.title_zh: 随着 Cipher 和 Hut 8 创下新高，比特币矿工到人工智能的繁荣推动股市飙升
items.summary_zh: 在推出与戴尔相关的另一项重大人工智能基础设施扩展后，IREN 股价上涨了 10%，创下历史新高。

items.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型反驳了离散几何的中心猜想
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 模型解决了 80 年历史的单位距离问题，反驳了离散几何中的一个重大猜想，标志着人工智能驱动数学的里程碑。

items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5：前沿情报与行动
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
items.summary: The complaint from the Southern District of New York comes just over a month after another insider trading case on Polymarket.
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工被控在 Polymarket 搜索词上进行 100 万美元内幕交易
items.summary_zh: 纽约南区的投诉是在 Polymarket 发生另一起内幕交易案件一个多月后发出的。

items.title: Traders are skeptical of Iran timeline for Strait of Hormuz reopening
items.summary: Despite reports Iran could return the passageway to normal traffic flows within a month of a peace deal, Kalshi traders thought that was unlikely.
items.title_zh: 交易商对伊朗重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的时间表持怀疑态度
items.summary_zh: 尽管有报道称伊朗可能会在和平协议签署后一个月内使该通道恢复正常交通，但卡尔什贸易商认为这不太可能。

items.title: Taiwan chip stocks climb after Nvidia announces $150 billion spending plans
items.summary: Mainland China-based chip giants such as Cambricon saw their shares tumble on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 英伟达宣布 1500 亿美元支出计划后，台湾芯片股上涨
items.summary_zh: 寒武纪等中国大陆芯片巨头的股价周三暴跌。

items.title: China industrial profits jump 24.7% in April, fastest gain in over two years despite headwinds
items.summary: China’s industrial profits grew at their fastest pace in over two years in April, buoyed by stronger exports, higher producer prices and gains in upstream industries.
items.title_zh: 尽管面临阻力，中国 4 月份工业利润增长 24.7%，创两年多来最快增幅
items.summary_zh: 受出口强劲、生产者价格上涨和上游产业增长的推动，4月份中国工业利润增速创两年多来最快。

items.title: European companies double down on China manufacturing despite EU de-risking push
items.summary: Low manufacturing costs in China are keeping many European businesses' supply chains in the country despite pressure in the EU to reduce overseas reliance.
items.title_zh: 尽管欧盟推动降低风险，欧洲企业仍加倍投资中国制造业
items.summary_zh: 尽管欧盟面临减少海外依赖的压力，但中国较低的制造成本使许多欧洲企业的供应链留在了中国。

items.title: Piper Sandler says Strait of Hormuz to remain closed for months and oil to hit new highs
items.summary: Prolonged closure of Strait of Hormuz could send crude oil prices to new highs this summer.
items.title_zh: 派珀·桑德勒表示霍尔木兹海峡将关闭数月，油价将创下新高
items.summary_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡的长期关闭可能会使今年夏天的原油价格创下新高。

items.title: Matthew Perry's assistant jailed for 41 months over actor's ketamine death
items.summary: Kenneth Iwamasa, who pleaded guilty last year to one count of conspiracy to distribute ketamine causing death, said he "will forever regret" his actions.
items.title_zh: 马修·佩里 (Matthew Perry) 助理因氯胺酮致死被判入狱 41 个月
items.summary_zh: 肯尼思·岩正(Kenneth Iwamasa)去年承认了一项共谋分发氯胺酮致人死亡的罪名，他表示，他“将永远后悔”自己的行为。

items.title: Five people found alive after week trapped in flooded Laos cave
items.summary: The search is continuing for a further two villagers who are still missing, rescuers say.
items.title_zh: 老挝洞穴被淹一周后，五人被发现生还
items.summary_zh: 救援人员称，对另外两名仍然失踪的村民的搜寻仍在继续。

items.title: Israeli strike in Gaza City kills new head of Hamas's military wing
items.summary: Hamas says Mohammed Odeh was killed alongside his wife and two children in a strike on a residential building.
items.title_zh: 以色列对加沙城的袭击杀死了哈马斯军事部门的新领导人
items.summary_zh: 哈马斯表示，穆罕默德·奥德在对住宅楼的一次袭击中与他的妻子和两个孩子一起被杀。

items.title: Woman caught after 30 years on the run is jailed for armed robberies
items.summary: Klette was finally caught in a flat in Berlin in 2024 and put on trial last year.
items.title_zh: 女子逃亡30年后被捕，因持械抢劫被判入狱
items.summary_zh: 2024 年，克莱特终于在柏林的一间公寓里被捕，并于去年接受审判。

items.title: One killed and nine missing after chemical explosion at US paper mill
items.summary: Nine others were injured and another nine are missing after a tank ruptured at a paper mill in Longview, Washington.
items.title_zh: 美国造纸厂化学爆炸造成1人死亡、9人失踪
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州朗维尤一家造纸厂的储罐破裂，造成九人受伤，另有九人失踪。

items.title: Hotel that refused to give tourist tap water acted lawfully, Italian court rules
items.summary: The Italian Supreme Court rejected a tourist's claim that her consumer rights were breached when she was only offered €7 bottled mineral water.
items.title_zh: 意大利法院裁定酒店拒绝向游客提供自来水行为合法
items.summary_zh: 意大利最高法院驳回了一名游客的申诉，称她只获得了 7 欧元的瓶装矿泉水，从而侵犯了她的消费者权利。

items.title: A Quiet Pacific Village Becomes China’s Security Testing Ground
items.summary: When a remote Pacific village asked for help with rowdy youth, the Chinese police arrived with a surveillance system. Then came the backlash.
items.title_zh: 安静的太平洋村庄成为中国的安全试验场
items.summary_zh: 当一个偏远的太平洋村庄向吵闹的年轻人寻求帮助时，中国警察带着监控系统赶到了。然后是强烈反对。

items.title: After 88 Days of Censored News, TV and Chat, Iranians Are Coming Back Online
items.summary: The government is letting people connect with the world after a near-total internet shutdown. But not everyone has access, and those who do wonder how long it will last.
items.title_zh: 经过 88 天的新闻、电视和聊天审查后，伊朗人重新上线
items.summary_zh: 在互联网几乎完全关闭后，政府正在让人们与世界保持联系。但并不是每个人都可以访问，而那些访问的人也想知道它能持续多久。

items.title: Nigel Farage’s Far-Right Party Is Now Central to British Politics
items.summary: Nigel Farage’s anti-immigrant, populist agenda has helped his party, Reform U.K., emerge from the fringe of politics in Britain. But it faces an uphill climb to win power.
items.title_zh: 奈杰尔·法拉奇的极右翼政党现在是英国政治的核心
items.summary_zh: 奈杰尔·法拉奇的反移民、民粹主义议程帮助他的政党改革英国摆脱了英国政治的边缘。但要赢得权力，它面临着艰难的攀登。

items.title: Samsung Unions Approve Pay Deal That Highlights Inequality of A.I. Age
items.summary: The agreement all but guarantees hefty bonuses for employees in the top-performing chip unit. Other workers say they feel left out.
items.title_zh: 三星工会批准薪酬协议，凸显人工智能领域的不平等年龄
items.summary_zh: 该协议几乎保证了这家表现最佳的芯片部门的员工可以获得高额奖金。其他工人表示，他们感到被忽视了。

items.title: Rubio’s India Visit Yields No Major Deals to Repair U.S.-India Relations
items.summary: The secretary of state visited India to reassure the South Asian giant that it can still rely on the United States. India did not gain much from the visit.
items.title_zh: 卢比奥的印度之行没有达成修复美印关系的重大协议
items.summary_zh: 国务卿访问印度是为了让这个南亚巨人放心，它仍然可以依赖美国。印度此次访问并没有得到太多收获。

items.title: Inventor of the Basque Cheesecake Plans to Retire. His Secret: He Prefers Chocolate
items.summary: Santiago Rivera is widely credited with creating the “burnt” cheesecake in the 1980s, though he doesn’t love the spinoffs it has spawned. Decades later, he’s preparing to hand over his kitchen to his children.
items.title_zh: 巴斯克芝士蛋糕的发明者计划退休。他的秘密：他更喜欢巧克力
items.summary_zh: 圣地亚哥·里维拉 (Santiago Rivera) 被广泛认为是 20 世纪 80 年代“烧焦”芝士蛋糕的创造者，尽管他并不喜欢它所衍生的衍生品。几十年后，他准备将厨房交给他的孩子们。

items.title: Uganda Closes Border With Congo as Ebola Fears Rise
items.summary: Seven confirmed cases of the virus have already been reported in Kampala, the capital, but officials say the country has robust disease surveillance.
items.title_zh: 由于埃博拉病毒担忧加剧，乌干达关闭了与刚果的边境
items.summary_zh: 首都坎帕拉已报告七例确诊病例，但官员表示该国拥有强大的疾病监测。

items.title: U.S. CFTC files request to erase Gemini settlement that it no longer considers fair
items.summary: The regulator went back to analyze the 2022 case and decided that it wouldn't have been pursued under current management and practices.
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 请求取消其认为不再公平的 Gemini 和解协议
items.summary_zh: 监管机构回过头来分析 2022 年的案件，并决定在当前的管理和做法下不会追究该案件。

items.title: Block kicks off Cash App’s phased stablecoin roll out to its nearly 60 million users
items.summary: An individual familiar with the matter told CoinDesk the stablecoin feature was rolled out to 25% of users already and by the end of the week, all users will have access.
items.title_zh: Block 开始向近 6000 万用户分阶段推出 Cash App 稳定币
items.summary_zh: 一位知情人士告诉 CoinDesk，稳定币功能已经向 25% 的用户推出，到本周末，所有用户都将可以使用。

items.title: White House starts review of CFTC’s prediction markets rulemaking as Trump backs agency authority
items.summary: The White House is reviewing proposed prediction market rules as President Trump throws his support behind the CFTC.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持机构权威，白宫开始审查商品期货交易委员会的预测市场规则制定
items.summary_zh: 随着特朗普总统对 CFTC 的支持，白宫正在审查拟议的预测市场规则。

items.title: TD Cowen says Trump’s CFTC prediction markets post unlikely to change legal fight
items.summary: The future of prediction markets will likely be decided by the Supreme Court, while states still appear to hold the advantage, TD Cowen said.
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 表示特朗普的 CFTC 预测市场发布不太可能改变法律斗争
items.summary_zh: TD Cowen 表示，预测市场的未来可能将由最高法院决定，而各州似乎仍占据优势。

items.title: Falcon Finance taps Anchorage to issue new GENIUS-compliant payments stablecoin fUSD
items.summary: Falcon said fUSD is meant to act as a “regulated counterpart” to its existing overcollateralized synthetic stablecoin USDf.
items.title_zh: Falcon Finance 利用 Anchorage 发行新的符合 GENIUS 标准的支付稳定币 fUSD
items.summary_zh: Falcon 表示，fUSD 旨在充当其现有超额抵押合成稳定币 USDf 的“受监管对应物”。

items.title: Aztec Labs acquires ZKPassport, pledges to keep privacy protocol and iOS mobile app open-source
items.summary: The Obsidion team, including co-founders Michael Elliot and Theo Madzou, will join Aztec Labs to continue developing ZKPassport.
items.title_zh: Aztec Labs 收购 ZKPassport，承诺保持隐私协议和 iOS 移动应用开源
items.summary_zh: Obsidion 团队，包括联合创始人 Michael Elliot 和 Theo Madzou，将加入 Aztec Labs 继续开发 ZKPassport。

items.title: Bitdeer taps former Corsair Gaming and semiconductor exec Michael Potter as CFO
items.summary: Bitdeer will retain Jianchun Liu as a principal advisor and said the resignation was due to personal reasons.
items.title_zh: Bitdeer 任命前 Corsair Gaming 和半导体高管 Michael Potter 为首席财务官
items.summary_zh: 比特鹿将保留刘建春担任首席顾问，并表示辞职是由于个人原因。

items.title: Mastercard secures New York State BitLicense as it continues to expand crypto services
items.summary: New York has now officially granted three Virtual Currency Business Activity Licenses (aka BitLicenses) in 2026.
items.title_zh: 万事达卡获得纽约州 BitLicense 继续扩展加密服务
items.summary_zh: 纽约现已于 2026 年正式授予三张虚拟货币业务活动许可证（又名比特许可证）。

items.title: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex
items.summary: See how OpenAI, Thrive, and Crete built a self-improving tax agent with Codex, automating filings, improving accuracy, and accelerating workflows.
items.title_zh: 利用 Codex 打造自我完善的税务代理人
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI、Thrive 和 Crete 如何使用 Codex 构建自我改进的税务代理，实现归档自动化、提高准确性并加速工作流程。

items.title: Election information and safeguards in 2026
items.summary: Ahead of global elections, we’re helping people access information, supporting cyber defenders, and increasing AI transparency
items.title_zh: 2026 年选举信息和保障措施
items.summary_zh: 在全球选举之前，我们正在帮助人们获取信息、支持网络防御者并提高人工智能透明度

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
items.summary: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.
items.title_zh: 维珍航空如何利用 Codex 加快运输速度
items.summary_zh: 维珍航空如何使用 Codex 在固定的假日旅行截止日期内发布其改进的移动应用程序，实现接近全部单元测试覆盖率和零 P1 缺陷。

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 被 Gartner 评为企业编码代理领域的领导者
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 2026 年 Gartner 企业 AI 编码代理魔力象限中被评为领导者，Codex 因创新和企业规模部署而获得认可。

items.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
items.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
items.title_zh: AdventHealth 利用 OpenAI 推进全人护理
items.summary_zh: AdventHealth 正在使用 ChatGPT for Healthcare 来简化工作流程、减轻管理负担，并将更多时间用于患者护理。

items.title: Reachy Mini goes fully local
items.title_zh: Reachy Mini 完全本地化

items.title: Shipping a Trillion Parameters With a Hub Bucket: Delta Weight Sync in TRL
items.title_zh: 使用 Hub Bucket 运输数万亿个参数：TRL 中的 Delta Weight Sync

items.title: Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right
items.title_zh: 值得正确使用的工具、脚手架和人工智能代理术语

items.title: Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family
items.title_zh: Ettin Reranker 系列简介

items.title: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend
items.title_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5：使用 Transformers 后端运行 OCR 和文档解析任务

items.title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
items.title_zh: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2：具有 32K 上下文的 Open Apache 2.0 多语言嵌入 — 最佳低于 100M 的检索质量

items.title: Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026.
items.summary: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.
items.title_zh: 赶上 Google I/O 2026 的对话舞台。
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2026 年 I/O 对话，领导人讨论人工智能、量子计算、机器人和创造力的未来。

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: I/O 2026
items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.
items.title_zh: I/O 2026：欢迎来到充满活力的双子座时代
items.summary_zh: Google I/O 最新动态：了解我们如何帮助您利用 Gemini 完成更多工作。

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.
items.title_zh: 人工智能搜索的新时代
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了将搜索引擎的最佳功能与人工智能的最佳功能结合在一起的下一步。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育计划首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
